name: expert-label-workspace
description: Root scripts for the Expert Label workspace

scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND "cd backend && alembic upgrade head && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && alembic upgrade head && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
